name: Roast Pork Loin with Cream Gravy
recipeIngredient: 17 lb pork loin roast with bone
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove chine bones using a meat saw so loins can be separated into chops.
2. When cooked, rub the loins with salt, black pepper, and sage.
3. Place chine bones in the bottom of a roasting pan.
4. Place loins, fat side up, on top of the bones.
5. Insert a meat thermometer into the thickest part of the muscle.
6. Roast at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 60 minutes.
7. Add mirepoix to the bottom of the pan and baste with fat. Roast at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 60-90 minutes, or until internal temperature reaches 160 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Remove roast from the pan and keep warm. Remove chine bones and reserve them for stock or soup.
9. Place the roasting pan over a moderate flame. Cook until mirepoix is browned and moisture has evaporated. Drain off and reserve fat.
10. Deglaze the pan with stock.
11. Combine contents with milk in a saucepan, and skim well.
12. Heat 5 ounces of the reserved fat in a skillet. Add flour, heat, and whisk to make a honey-colored roux.
13. Whisk the roux into the saucepan. Heat and stir until thickened and slightly reduced.
14. Strain through a chinois.
15. Finish gravy with heavy cream. Adjust seasonings.
16. Cut between the ribs into chops. Serve hot.
